reference: BUT IT SEEMS THIS GENTLEMAN IS NOT SO EASY ACCESS BUT YOU MAY ACKNOWLEDGE SOMETHING DUE TO ME IF I INCLINE HIM TO LOOK GRACIOUSLY UPON YOU AND THEREFORE THERE IS NOT MUCH HARM DONE
text: But it seems this gentleman is not so easy access. But you may acknowledge something due to me, if I incline him to look graciously upon you, and therefore, there is not much harm done.
